name: Smiling Pink Axolotl
subject: animals/axolotl
prompt: a cheerful pink axolotl floating in profile with a wide upturned smile, six feathery gill stalks fanning out from its head, four short legs, and a long wavy tail trailing behind

name: Baby Axolotl
subject: animals/axolotl
prompt: a tiny chubby baby axolotl with a big round head, large sparkly eyes, a sweet little smile, stubby legs, and small soft frilly gills, looking up curiously

name: Axolotl Close-Up Portrait
subject: animals/axolotl
prompt: a close-up head-and-shoulders portrait of an axolotl facing forward, big friendly eyes, a wide curved smiling mouth, and large detailed feathery gill branches spreading out on both sides of its head

name: Axolotl in Water Plants
subject: animals/axolotl
prompt: an axolotl gliding gently among tall wavy underwater plants and leafy reeds, a few small bubbles rising around it, soft pebbles scattered along the bottom

name: Two Axolotl Friends
subject: animals/axolotl
prompt: two happy axolotls swimming side by side facing each other, both smiling with feathery gills, their tails curving toward one another to almost form a heart shape

name: Axolotl with a Snail
subject: animals/axolotl
prompt: a curious axolotl resting on the bottom of a pond looking at a little snail crawling on a smooth rock, a few water plants and bubbles nearby

name: Sleeping Axolotl
subject: animals/axolotl
prompt: a cozy axolotl curled up resting on a soft bed of pebbles with its eyes closed and a peaceful smile, gills relaxed and laid back, tail wrapped gently around its body

name: Axolotl Blowing Bubbles
subject: animals/axolotl
prompt: a playful axolotl with an open round mouth blowing a stream of bubbles upward, eyes bright and cheerful, feathery gills swept back as if it just moved, a few plants below

name: Axolotl in a Fish Tank
subject: animals/axolotl
prompt: an axolotl inside a home aquarium scene, a small treasure chest and a tiny castle ornament on the gravel floor, a leafy plant in the corner, and bubbles drifting up toward the water line

name: Axolotl Wearing a Crown
subject: animals/axolotl
prompt: an adorable axolotl wearing a small pointed crown tilted on its head, a proud happy smile, frilly gills fanned out like royal feathers, sitting upright

name: Axolotl and Tiny Fish
subject: animals/axolotl
prompt: a smiling axolotl swimming through the water surrounded by a few small friendly fish, gentle waves of water plants behind them and a scattering of bubbles

name: Detailed Axolotl Scene
subject: animals/axolotl
prompt: a detailed axolotl exploring a rich underwater scene with rocks, pebbles, swaying tall plants, a starfish, and many small bubbles, its feathery gills and toes carefully drawn
